omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
3. How We Use and Share Personal Information
The purposes and ways of use of personal information are described in correspondent provisions of Privacy Policy.
We may disclose your personal information to a third party for a business purpose to:
Service providers who assist in operations (e.g., analytics, payment processing).
•
Affiliates or partners as necessary for providing services.
Law enforcement or government agencies as required by law.
As part of corporate transactions (e.g., mergers, acquisitions).
In the past 12 months, we have disclosed the following categories of personal information for business purposes:
•
•
•
•
Identifiers (e.g., name, email, IP address).
Commercial information (e.g., interactions with our app).
Internet activity (e.g., usage data).
Geolocation data.
